applicability: executable iOS production code and public contracts
concurrency, accessibility, UI smoke, and performance evidence
exception_policy: Bind the exact untested executable behavior, risk, unavailable signal, alternative evidence, owner, approver, expiry, and remediation plan; documentation is not executable behavior and self-reported output is not evidence.
rationale: Risk-proportionate deterministic tests and factual evidence protect executable behavior without imposing TDD or runtime gates on documentation and metadata.
review_cadence: Review strategy after material contract, concurrency, accessibility, critical-journey, toolchain, or performance changes and review suite health on the organization-defined engineering cadence.
title: Modern Testing and Evidence
